src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/Dagserve.general_idea: Exclude MongoAutoConfiguration to prevent startup failure when MongoDB dependencies or configuration are missing.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/Dagserve.why_exists: Spring Boot auto-configuration attempts to connect to MongoDB on startup; without exclusion, this causes a runtime exception (e.g., BeanCreationException or ConnectionRefusedException) if MongoDB is not available or configured.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Update the LoginUseCase interface to use a specific SessionDTO return type instead of a generic String.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Method signature mismatch causes compilation errors in any class implementing this interface or calling this method expecting the old return type.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Replace the unused java.util.List import with the new SessionDTO domain model import.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compilation error due to missing symbol SessionDTO if the import is not added.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add import for new DTO used in added method signatures.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol DirectoryEntryDTO.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add import for new DTO used in added method signatures.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol ExceptionsDTO.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add import for new DTO used in added method signatures.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol KeystoreEntryDTO.
Method no longer part of the contract; callers must be updated.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add AuthDTO parameter to createJar method signature to support authentication context.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Method signature mismatch causes compilation errors in implementing classes and callers that expect the new parameter.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.before: void createJar(String bin, Boolean force,Properties props) throws DomainException;
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.after: void createJar(String bin, Boolean force,Properties props, AuthDTO objauth) throws DomainException;

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add new reimport method to the interface to support re-importing JAR files.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Implementing classes must implement this new abstract method to compile.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add import for org.json.JSONObject to support the new reimport method return type.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compilation error due to unknown type JSONObject.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add import for main.cl.dagserver.domain.model.AuthDTO to support the new createJar parameter.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compilation error due to unknown type AuthDTO.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add import for java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture to support the new return type of the execute method.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class CompletableFuture

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Add import for com.nhl.dflib.DataFrame to support the new return type of the execute method.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class DataFrame

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.general_idea: Change the execute method signature to return a CompletableFuture containing a Map of DataFrames and add a data parameter.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.why_exists: Compile error: method signature mismatch in interface implementation or usage
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.before: public void execute(String jarname, String dagname, String type) throws DomainException;
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/applicat.after: public CompletableFuture<Map<String, DataFrame>> execute(String jarname, String dagname, String type, String data) throws DomainException;
